title: 利益冲突定义 / Definition of COI
point: 利益冲突指两方目标不相容/不一致,某人可借其地位为己谋利;严重时可构成法律上的贪腐罪行。 / A COI is where two parties' objectives are incompatible and a person can use his position for personal gain; in some cases it may amount to a corruption offence at law.
keyfacts: 妥善管理通常无碍,处理不当生道德问题 / Managed well it is fine; mishandled it causes ethical problems
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.18 §1

title: 两类冲突 / Two types of COI
point: '内建'(built-in)冲突=代表'发现'自己身处;'制造'(created)冲突=代表通过自身行为造成(如偏袒夫妻一方)。 / 'Built-in' = the representative 'finds' himself in it; 'created' = he 'creates' it by his own actions (e.g. favouring one spouse).
keyfacts: 另有源于机构政策的冲突,代表难以抽身 / Some originate in institutional policy and are hard to escape
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.18 §2

title: 五种利益错位 / Five misalignments
point: 中介结构产生五类错位:代表-客户、机构/代表-客户、机构-客户、代表-多名客户、机构-多名客户。 / The intermediary structure gives five misalignments: rep–client; institution/rep–client; institution–client; rep–multiple clients; institution–multiple clients.
keyfacts: 例:为高净值客户创造机会而损害零售客户 / e.g. opportunities for HNW clients at retail clients' expense
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.18 §2.4

title: 六种表现形式 / Six manifestations
point: 利益错位表现为:偏颇建议、强制交叉销售、过度交易、未能执行、披露不足、侵犯隐私。 / Manifestations: biased advice, involuntary cross-selling, excessive trading, failure to execute, insufficient disclosure, violation of privacy.
keyfacts: 均损害代表的客观性与独立性 / All compromise the rep's objectivity and independence
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.18 §3.3

title: 强制交叉销售 / Involuntary cross-selling
point: 客户被操纵购买不需要的附加产品即为强制交叉销售,以两种方式发生:被迫搭售才能获想要产品;采用对客户不利的'默认选项'。 / Manipulating a client into unwanted add-ons; occurs two ways — bundling to access the wanted product, and an adverse 'default option'.
keyfacts: 搭售须告知附加产品的需要/适合性 / Bundling requires disclosing need/suitability
利用信息不对称 / Exploits information asymmetry
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.18 §5

title: Churning vs Twisting
point: Churning=劝客户掏空原保单为同一保险公司新保单融资;Twisting=转向另一家保险公司的新保单,均纯为生佣金。 / Churning = draining a policy to fund a new one with the SAME insurer; Twisting = with ANOTHER insurer; both solely for commission.
keyfacts: 过度交易=churning;均由代表制造冲突 / Excessive trading = churning; rep creates the conflict
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.18 §6.7–6.8

title: 事实上的酌情控制 / De facto discretionary control
point: 当客户无法自行判断、评估代表建议、对代表高度依赖时,代表被视为对账户有'事实上的酌情控制权',churning 可成立。 / Where a client cannot exercise his own judgment and depends heavily on the rep, the rep has 'de facto discretionary control'.
keyfacts: 也可基于正式/酌情控制权 / Also via formal or discretionary control
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.18 §6.4

title: 未能执行 / Failure to execute
point: 须按客户指示、在限制内取得最优价格、勤勉迅速执行;延迟或误导付款均属未能执行,挪用所收款项则属欺骗/欺诈。 / Must execute per instructions, get best price within limits, act promptly; delay/misdirection = failure; appropriating funds = cheating/fraud.
keyfacts: 故意操纵指令以自利=制造冲突 / Deliberately manipulating orders = creating a conflict
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.18 §7

title: 披露不足 vs 误导 / Insufficient vs misleading
point: 披露不足=未给出合理客户作知情决定所需的全部信息;误导=以混淆/掩盖真实含义的方式传达。须用通俗语言、解释术语。 / Insufficient = withholding needed info; misleading = conveying so as to confuse/obfuscate. Use plain language and explain jargon.
keyfacts: 演示须说明假设性,不可当作业绩保证 / Illustrations must show their hypothetical nature, not guarantees
1995 NAIC 通过演示示范规例 / NAIC Model Regulation adopted 1995
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.18 §8

title: 侵犯隐私/违反保密 / Privacy breach
point: 违反道德守则及《个人资料保护法》(PDPA),为己利使用/披露客户资料即破坏信任;客户数据不得存于个人设备/云端,退出时不得保留。 / Using/disclosing client data for own gain breaches the code and the PDPA; no storage on personal devices/cloud, none kept on exit.
keyfacts: 例:出售客户资料给第三方做营销 / e.g. selling client data to third parties for marketing
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.18 §9

title: 受信标准四义务 / Four fiduciary duties
point: 受信人将客户利益置于自身及任何第三方之上,履行谨慎、忠诚、服从、诚信四义务;原则导向。 / A fiduciary puts the client above his own and any third party's interest, observing care, loyalty, obedience and good faith; principles-based.
keyfacts: 忠诚义务含披露潜在/实际冲突 / Loyalty includes disclosing potential/actual conflicts
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.18 §11

title: 适合性 vs 受信 / Suitability vs fiduciary
point: 适合性=规则导向(满足 FAA s.36、FAA-N16:KYC、需求分析、文件记录),适用于产品;受信=原则导向,引导整体行为。'适合' ≠ '最佳利益'。 / Suitability is rules-based (FAA s.36, FAA-N16) and applies to products; fiduciary is principles-based. 'Suitable' ≠ 'best interest'.
keyfacts: 非上市 SIP 须 CKA;上市 SIP 须 Client Account Review / Unlisted SIP needs CKA; listed SIP needs Client Account Review
sourceRef: RES5 Study Text Part II Ch.18 §12–13
